title: Prettier Lanterns
description: Adds beautiful ore, dye, and seasonal lanterns with matching dyeable chains for cozy vanilla-style decoration.
body:
# Prettier Lanterns

**Prettier Lanterns** is a vanilla-friendly decoration mod that adds new lantern variants and matching dyeable chains to Minecraft.

Light up your builds with ore-themed lanterns, colorful dye lanterns, seasonal lanterns, and matching chains that fit naturally with the vanilla style.

## Features

- Ore and material lantern variants
- All 16 dye-colored lanterns
- Seasonal lanterns for Halloween, Christmas, and Easter
- Dyeable iron chains for every dye color
- Chains can be placed vertically and horizontally, just like vanilla chains
- Animated lantern block textures
- Clean item textures
- Crafting recipes for all lanterns and chains
- Creative inventory support

## Lantern Types

Prettier Lanterns adds multiple lantern styles for different builds:

- Copper Lantern
- Iron Lantern
- Gold Lantern
- Diamond Lantern
- Emerald Lantern
- Redstone Lantern
- Lapis Lantern
- Coal Lantern
- Quartz Lantern
- Amethyst Lantern
- Netherite Lantern
- Dye-colored Lanterns
- Halloween Lantern
- Christmas Lantern
- Easter Lantern

## Dyeable Chains

The mod also adds matching dyeable iron chains, so your lanterns and chains can fit together in the same color theme.

These chains work like vanilla chains and can be placed both vertically and sideways.

## Recipes

Most recipes are simple and vanilla-friendly:

- Lantern + material/dye = new lantern
- Iron Chain + dye = colored iron chain

## Perfect For

- Cozy houses
- Medieval builds
- Fantasy builds
- Caves
- Gardens
- Paths
- Villages
- Seasonal decorations

## Future Updates

More lanterns, chains, and decoration features may be added in future updates.
